ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Raspberry Pi, Laptop) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is placed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raspberry_pi_devices" (
  "rasp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Raspberry Pi device */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device this Raspberry Pi belongs to */,
  "rasp_type" TEXT /* Type of Raspberry Pi (e.g., Model 3B, Model 4B) */,
  " serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the Raspberry Pi */,
  "bootloader_version" TEXT /* Version of the bootloader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rasp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raspberry_pi_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_strengths" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal strength reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device this signal strength belongs to */,
  "signal_value" INTEGER /* Signal strength value (in dBm) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signal strength was recorded */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., WiFi, Bluetooth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_strengths_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., meeting room, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device movement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that moved */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the device moved to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device moved */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., moved to, moved from) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_movements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_movements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device this configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device this event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., connection, disconnection) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
